subcodes.title: Words to Mr and Mrs Hannen, spoken around 1909-02-22
subcodes.first_line: To remove any source of differentiation, the believers must know that the Blessed Bab was giving the glad tidings of the coming of the Blessed Perfection
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @twin Manifestations
